name: Moroccan-Style Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lamb; chopped into 1-inch cubes (leanest cut possible)
4 cups Couscous; hot, cooked, prepared without fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly spray a hot 12-inch skillet with release spray. Add lamb and brown quickly on medium-high heat until the edges of the lamb cubes are slightly crusty.
2. Drain most of the grease from the pan.
3. Add onions, garlic, and water; bring to boiling, then cook over medium heat until the onions are translucent.
4. Add 3/4 cup Garbanzo beans (undrained), No-Salt Tomatoes, tomato paste, raisins, almonds, black pepper, thyme, salt, cinnamon, allspice, red pepper, and stock. Bring to boiling.
5. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours or until the lamb is very tender.
6. Add remaining Garbanzo beans and simmer for an additional 10 minutes or until the desired consistency is reached.
7. Serve over hot couscous.
